reapack.name: REAPER MCP
reapack.desc: REAPER MCP — Model Context Protocol interface (immersive/spatial audio)

version.author: James Livingston
version.changelog: First public macOS release. In-process MCP server (Streamable HTTP + SSE, JSON-RPC 2.0, MCP 2025-06-18); loopback-only transport with a bearer token; every mutation single-undo. 186 tools / 3 resources / 3 prompts, with immersive/spatial audio as the differentiator: channel beds (5.1–22.2), ambisonic encode/decode + order/format conversion (ACN/SN3D), surround panners, binaural monitoring + live head-tracking; native ADM BWF and Dolby Atmos Master File (.atmos triad) authoring + inspection; bed/object send-layout orchestration for an external renderer; immersive metering (ITU-R BS.1770 loudness, DirAC/Gerzon spatial field, per-object loudness, decode-coverage + per-object decode-coverage timelines); deliverable-spec conformance; immersive style chains with a multichannel true-peak limiter; a composite macro DSL; and async MCP elicitation for destructive confirmation.

metadata.description: A native REAPER extension exposing a first-class Model Context Protocol (MCP) interface, with immersive / spatial audio as the primary differentiator. Loopback-only transport with a bearer token; every mutation is single-undo. macOS-first; Windows/Linux to follow once load-verified.
